3242450.name: Forgotten Trails: Svalbard
3242450.description:
Svalbard is a land of ice, silence, and forgotten stories. Traverse snowy valleys on your snowmobile with your loyal dog Margis, climb frozen cliffs, cross icy fjords, and explore abandoned mines, shipwrecks, and ghost towns.

This 2.5D pixel adventure blends movement and terrain awareness with a climbing system - use ropes, ice axes, and momentum to tackle challenging ascents. Every step, slide, and descent feels alive thanks to detailed terrain interactions. Polar bears roam the coasts observe from a distance and respect their space.

After a long day, return to the lights of Longyearbyen, where warm drinks and new stories await
3242450.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 捷克语*, 波兰语*, 俄语*, 乌克兰语*, 立陶宛语*, 挪威语*, 爱沙尼亚语*, 塞尔维亚语*, 斯洛伐克语*, 斯洛文尼亚语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
